elements.content: Nested Story Continuation Inside Story Lanes
This regression fixture places a nested story into the second lane of an outer multi-column story. The nested story must continue across pages without letting later outer-story flow jump ahead of it.

children.content: The nested story begins in lane two after this note and should continue as a real nested story actor.
